speaker: seller

args.message: Well hello there! You've got a great eye for quality. This 2019 Toyota RAV4 XLE is a one-owner gem, practically singing with all the advanced tech like Toyota Safety Sense 2.0 and a big 8-inch touchscreen. These RAV4s are famous for going the distance, and this one's been babied with full service records. Ready to hit the road on your next big adventure?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? Not a chance on this beauty! Clean history, all clear. These RAV4s? Honestly, they're built to last practically forever. I've seen them roll over 300,000 miles with nothing but regular oil changes. This one's only got 52,000 miles, so it's just getting warmed up!

args.message: That's a fair starting point, I appreciate that. But honestly, for a one-owner, meticulously maintained RAV4 XLE with this low mileage and all the bells and whistles, $27,495 is already a steal. I might be able to knock off a little, say $27,350, to get you rolling today?
